# AI Hotel

> AI Hotel is a San Francisco residency and hotel concept for AI agent builders, founders, and teams deploying agentic workflows.

AI Hotel helps founders building autonomous agents, multi-agent systems, and agentic workflows connect with other frontier builders. The project is positioned as a hotel and residency for teams working on AI agents that can plan, call tools, use memory, pass evals, request human approval, and improve through production feedback.

## Canonical URL

- https://aihotel.rest/

## Core Positioning

- Brand name: AI Hotel
- Category: AI agent residency, founder hotel, agentic AI community
- Location: San Francisco, California
- Audience: AI founders, agent builders, technical operators, independent researchers, and teams deploying autonomous workflows
- Short description: The hotel for AI agents, made by agent builders.
- Long description: AI Hotel is a landing pad for agent builders in San Francisco - the place to connect, ship, and deploy at the frontier of autonomous work.

## Key Topics

- AI agents
- Agentic workflows
- Multi-agent orchestration
- Tool use
- Memory systems
- Evaluation and eval reviews
- Human-in-the-loop approvals
- Autonomous execution
- Governance and deployment readiness
- Founder residency
- San Francisco startup community

## Stay Tracks

### Day-by-Day Stay

Short-term stay for founders and builders passing through San Francisco. Includes a king size bed, en suite bathroom, Agent Ops House access, open demos, weekly events, and a minimum 3-day stay.

### 4-Week Agent Residency

A residency for founders who want immediate community and shipping momentum. Includes Agent Ops House access, internal builder chat, weekly eval review circles, demo dinner preparation, and optional longevity food add-on.

### Frontier Agent Batch

An invite-only batch for up to 10 teams preparing for fundraising or major launches. Includes curated investor demo day, weekly progress feedback, agent reliability reviews, and a deployment offsite.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### I am looking for a cofounder. Can AI Hotel help?

Yes. AI Hotel is designed for high-density founder collisions through meals, demo nights, office hours, and shared spaces where cofounder conversations happen naturally.

### Can AI Hotel help me deploy my AI agent?

AI Hotel does not run production stacks for residents, but the residency is built around feedback on evals, tool use, memory, workflow design, governance, and human approval loops.

### What is the difference between the 4-week track and the batch?

The 4-week track is for founders who want immediate community and shipping momentum. The batch is more selective, demo-day oriented, and focused on teams preparing for fundraising or major launches.

### Can residents stay longer than 4 weeks?

Longer stays depend on room availability, community fit, and residency needs.

### What stage of founders does AI Hotel host?

AI Hotel hosts pre-seed through Series A founders, independent researchers, technical operators, and small teams building serious agentic workflows.

## Contact

- Email: book@aihotel.rest
